code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut found = false
  mut result = ""
  mut line_opt = io.read_line()
  while not found
    match line_opt
    when None
      found = true
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        result = trimmed
        found = true
      else
        line_opt = io.read_line()
      end
    end
  end
  if string.is_empty(result)
    println("(none)")
  else
    println(result)
  end
  Ok(())
end
